panels.description: Wide establishing shot of the Council Rock in the jungle. A group of mangy, scarred, and limping wolves gather in the shadows, looking weary and defeated. Moody, desaturated lighting.

bubbles.text: Ever since Akela had been deposed, the Pack had been without a leader. They came to the Council Rock, limping from traps and wounds, a shadow of their former strength.

panels.description: Medium shot of the Council Rock surface. Shere Khan's striped hide is draped over the stone like a macabre trophy, his huge claws dangling limp. The wolves stare at it in awe and fear.
Dynamic low-angle action shot. Mowgli is leaping on top of the stretched tiger skin, shouting with wild energy. Gray Brother and Akela look up at him, howling in synchronization.

bubbles.text: I am the master of the hunt!

panels.description: Close-up of Mowgli looking down at the wolves with a fierce, challenging expression. His hands are on his hips.

bubbles.text: Look well, O Wolves. Have I kept my word?

panels.description: Medium shot of Bagheera standing in the shadows behind Mowgli, looking wise and detached. Mowgli turns his head away, his expression solemn.

bubbles.text: Nay, they fought for freedom. Let them keep it.
Man-Pack and Wolf-Pack have cast me out.
